ST-LINK SN  : 0669FF313335415043185829
ST-LINK FW  : V2J47M34
Board       : P-NUCLEO-WB55
Voltage     : 3.26V
SWD freq    : 4000 KHz
Connect mode: Normal
Reset mode  : Software reset
Device ID   : 0x495
Revision ID : Rev Y
Device name : STM32WB5x/35xx
NVM size  : 1 MBytes
Device type : MCU
Device CPU  : Cortex-M4
BL Version  : 0xD5
Debug in Low Power mode enabled
